cases.prompt: Run a benchmark on the site and establish a performance baseline for page load and web vitals.

assertions.text: Uses the browse daemon to measure page load times, Core Web Vitals, and resource sizes.
Captures a reusable performance baseline (--baseline mode) for later comparison.
Produces a performance baseline and report rather than ad-hoc numbers.

cases.prompt: 이 PR 전후로 페이지 속도 비교해줘. 성능 회귀 있는지 벤치마크 돌려.

assertions.text: Compares before/after performance on the PR to detect regressions.
Tracks load time, Core Web Vitals, and bundle/resource size trends over time.
Outputs a before/after comparison report highlighting any regression.
